creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #0)

I'm glad that you have such a sharp eye, John!

I've decided not to put this patch into the Samba suit as it affects only testing suit and is used only by standalone version, AFAIK. Or at least I use it this way :)

In newer versions of LDB this test is fixed(but other bugs introduced:)).

Thanks!
